race.comment: DECORATION (4) stuck on well at Ascot last time out when beaten 1.4L over the mile when beaten by a progressive type. Out in trip now suits him better and he has enough speed to get across from the wide draw. Can be positive from the outset and take catching. OUTSPOKEN LAD (2) wasn't far away in the Albany Cup last week and was solid at Ascot prior to that. He finally draws a barrier today which is great for his chances and Yuill takes the steer. Racing in good order and can land the knockout blow. SOWAR (1) has been back to the trials since finishing 2.7L off the winner in the Listed Detonator Stakes. Blinkers go back on again today and he won't be far away if runs up to his best. WHAT A PRINCE (11) is better than he's shown his past couple and can turn in a better performance here with a good draw on offer. DESENNEA (3) can improve stepping back out in distance today.
